episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 514: Pucatrade Back From the Dead
episode.description:
James and Cliff go over the weekly top movers, meta shifts, cards to watch and explore the details of a possible resurrection of the Pucatrade monster.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
